commands.replaceTexWithTypst: Replace TeX with Typst in markdown content or selection

contextMenu.copyAsImgTag: Copy as img tag (for embedding into Obsidian notes)

excalidraw.heading: Excalidraw
excalidraw.previewPlaceholder: Type in the input above to see the preview

exportTool.documentIdentifierDesc: A unique identifier for the document.
exportTool.filenameTemplateDesc: Template for page filenames. {p}: page number, {0p}: zero-padded, {t}: total count.
exportTool.heading: Export Typst Document
exportTool.pageRangesDesc: Comma separated list of ranges. e.g., 1-3, 5, 7-
exportTool.ppiDesc: Pixels per inch. Higher values produce higher resolution (e.g., 72, 144, 300).
exportTool.standardDesc: Enforce conformance with a PDF standard.

processorExt.fitToNoteWidthDesc: Adds a line at the beginning of the code declaring length: WIDTH
processorExt.syntaxModeDesc: Specifies the syntax tree parsing mode. Select None to completely bypass AST parsing and syntax highlighting.

notices.crashAutoDisabled: [Typst Mate] The plugin has been automatically turned off due to three consecutive crashes
notices.exportFailed: Export failed. Check the console for details.
notices.failedToConvertSvgToPng: Failed to convert SVG to PNG
notices.initFailed: Failed to initialize Typst. Please check that the processor ID does not contain any symbols, try clearing the package cache, and ensure that there are no invalid fonts installed.
notices.revealDelayMustBePositive: Reveal Delay must be greater than 0
notices.templateDirNotExist: Template directory does not exist. Please create a `templates` directory in the import path.
notices.typstDirNotExist: Typst directory does not exist. Check the Advanced settings.

advanced.enableMathjaxFallbackDesc: Not recommended for performance reasons. When enabled, <bold>Typst errors, warnings, and hints will be unavailable.</bold>
advanced.importPathDesc: The directory in your vault to look for Typst files to import. If the path does not exist or is empty, this feature is disabled.
advanced.openTypstToolsOnStartupDesc: Open Typst Tools in the side panel when launching Obsidian.
advanced.snippetsManaged: Snippets are managed in a separate leaf.

compiler.disablePackageCacheDesc: Disable caching of imported packages. Useful for low-memory environments, but requires re-downloading packages.
compiler.skipStartupDesc: Defer initialization at startup (unstable on mobile). Reduces startup time but delays the first render.

font.clickToLoad: Click to load the system font list
font.heading: Font
font.importFontDesc: Desktop App only. Typst supports .ttf, .otf, .ttc, and .otc fonts.
font.importedFontsDesc: The string next to each font name is used to identify fonts that share the same PostScript name.

package.desc: When a package is imported, the cache is used instead of the actual files for faster performance. If you make changes directly, click the package icon to refresh the cache (plugin reload is required).
package.heading: Package

editor.complementSymbolWithUnicodeDesc: Automatically replace typed symbols with their Unicode equivalents.
editor.concealMathSymbolsDesc: Conceal math symbols (e.g., integral to ∫) in the editor.
editor.disableMacroDesc: Disable default macros such as mk and dm.
editor.enableInlinePreviewDesc: Show live preview for inline math.
editor.enableRevealDelayDesc: Add a delay before revealing concealed math symbols when the cursor is nearby.
editor.jumpOutsideBracketDesc: Allow the cursor to jump outside the current bracket pair.
editor.moveToEndOfMathBlock: Move to End of Math Block Before Exiting
editor.moveToEndOfMathBlockDesc: When exiting math mode, move the cursor to the end of the block first.
editor.preferInlineExit: Prefer Inline Exit for Single Line Display Math
editor.preferInlineExitDesc: If a display math block fits on a single line, exit inline instead of creating a new line.
editor.revealDelayDuration: Conceal Math Symbol Reveal Delay Duration (ms)
editor.revealDelayDurationDesc: Time in milliseconds to wait before revealing symbol text.
editor.revertTabToDefaultDesc: Revert the Tab key to default indentation behavior instead of jumping to the next placeholder.
editor.useObsidianThemeDesc: Use the Obsidian theme instead of the Typst theme. Requires reload.

processor.desc: In each mode, the first matching Processor ID from the top is used. An empty Processor ID acts as the default and should be placed at the bottom. In the format, {CODE} can be used (only the first occurrence is replaced), and fontsize can be used as an internal length value. In inline mode, separate the ID and the code with a colon : in the format. When adding or removing processors for codeblock mode, reload the plugin to apply changes. IDs should not contain any special characters! For more details, see Processor.md.
processor.heading: Processor
processor.inlineDesc: Use only inline elements, with no extra line breaks (including ; in Code mode) on the last line. If you use block elements, convert them to inline elements using the box function. To use the same typesetting as Typst, set the style to inline. For display math equations, using $#math.equation($ {CODE} $, block: false)$ is recommended.
processor.preambleDesc: Preamble can be turned on or off by toggling each processor.
processor.previewPlaceholder: Type in the input above to see the preview

renderer.baseColorDesc: Replace black in SVGs with another color. Useful for dark themes. Disable Use Theme Text Color to use this.
renderer.enableBackgroundRenderingDesc: The UI will no longer freeze, but it may conflict with plugins related to export or rendering. (Disabled automatically when exporting to PDF via Markdown menu)
renderer.fitToNoteWidthProfileDesc: Profile to use when calculating "fit to note width". Select a preset or Live to detect editor width.
renderer.offsetDesc: Vertical offset for inline math. The appearance may vary depending on the font used in Obsidian. Adjust as needed.
renderer.patchPdfExportDesc: Temporarily disable AutoBaseColor and use BaseColor during PDF export to fix white background issues in dark themes.
renderer.profilesDesc: Add or remove custom width profiles.
renderer.useThemeTextColorDesc: Use Obsidian's text color as the base color.
